member.name: T:KasaTapoClient.Discover
member.summary: Provides discovery helpers similar to python-kasa's Discover entry point.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.Discover.DiscoverAsync(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Broadcasts a discovery request and returns all responses collected within the timeout window.
member.param: The discovery timeout. If , a three second timeout is used.
The discovery target address. The default is the IPv4 broadcast address.
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A read-only collection of discovery responses.
member.exception: Thrown when the discovery operation is canceled.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.Discover.DiscoverSingleAsync(System.String,System.Int32,KasaTapoClient.DeviceCredentials,KasaTapoClient.DeviceConnectionOptions,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to a single device host and returns a ready-to-use device instance.
member.param: The device host name or IP address.
The device control port.
Optional credentials used by newer authenticated devices.
Transport-specific connection options used to select the device protocol.
The per-operation timeout. If , a five second timeout is used.
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A device instance with current system information loaded.
member.exception: Thrown when automatic transport resolution cannot obtain a matching discovery result for .

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.Discover.ConnectAsync(KasaTapoClient.DeviceConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects using a complete device configuration and returns a ready-to-use device instance.
member.param: The device configuration.
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A device instance with current system information loaded.
member.exception: Thrown when automatic transport resolution cannot obtain a matching discovery result for the configured host.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.Discover.ConnectAsync(KasaTapoClient.DeviceConfiguration,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects using a complete device configuration and optionally loads the initial device state.
member.param: The device configuration.
to load device state before returning; otherwise, .
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A device instance ready for direct commands.
member.exception: Thrown when automatic transport resolution cannot obtain a matching discovery result for the configured host.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.Discover.ConnectAsync(KasaTapoClient.DiscoveryResult,System.Boolean,KasaTapoClient.DeviceCredentials,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to a discovered device using the connection parameters parsed from its discovery result.
member.param: The discovery result to connect with.
to load device state before returning; otherwise, .
Optional credentials used by newer authenticated devices.
The per-operation timeout. If , a five second timeout is used.
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A connected device instance.
member.exception: Thrown when is .

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.Discover.CreateConfiguration(KasaTapoClient.DiscoveryResult,KasaTapoClient.DeviceCredentials,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Creates a device configuration directly from a discovery result.
member.param: The discovery result to convert.
Optional credentials used by newer authenticated devices.
The per-operation timeout. If , a five second timeout is used.
member.returns: A device configuration derived from the discovery metadata.
member.exception: Thrown when is .

member.name: T:KasaTapoClient.ChildSetupModule
member.summary: Provides child setup and pairing operations for smart hub devices.

member.name: P:KasaTapoClient.ChildSetupModule.SupportedCategories
member.summary: Gets the categories supported for child pairing, when reported.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.ChildSetupModule.ScanAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a child-device scan, waits for the specified timeout, and returns detected devices.
member.param: The number of seconds to wait before reading the hub's detected child-device list.
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: The detected child devices and supported categories reported by the hub.
member.exception: Thrown when the parent device does not support smart hub child setup operations.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.ChildSetupModule.GetDetectedDevicesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the current detected child devices from the hub scan state.
member.param: The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: The detected child devices and supported categories reported by the hub.
member.exception: Thrown when the parent device does not support smart hub child setup operations.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.ChildSetupModule.PairAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{KasaTapoClient.DetectedChildDevice},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pairs the specified detected child devices.
member.param: The detected child devices to pair with the hub.
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: The subset of requested devices that the hub confirmed after refresh.
member.exception: Thrown when the parent device does not support smart hub child setup operations.

member.name: M:KasaTapoClient.ChildSetupModule.UnpairAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a child device from the hub.
member.param: The child device identifier to remove from the hub.
The cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the child device has been removed and the parent state refreshed.
member.exception: Thrown when the parent device does not support smart hub child setup operations.
